usefulness_evaluation.narrative: This is a structural/adversarial test persona that does not evaluate AI usefulness. All 10 edge case tests passed. The API correctly validates input via buf.validate constraints (tests 2-4, 6-7, 9), returns proper NOT_FOUND for non-existent resources (test 1), enforces trip status state machine transitions (test 5 rejects completed->planning), handles idempotent delete silently (test 8), and returns valid array responses for list endpoints (test 10). No panics, no 500s, and all error codes are correctly categorized (INVALID_ARGUMENT vs NOT_FOUND vs FAILED_PRECONDITION).

test_01_gettrip_nonexistent_uuid.notes: Correct error code and message. No panic or 500.

test_02_gettrip_malformed_id.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: id: value must be a valid UUID
test_02_gettrip_malformed_id.notes: Validation interceptor correctly catches malformed UUIDs before business logic.

test_03_createtrip_empty_title.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: title: value length must be at least 1 characters

test_04_createtrip_oversized_title.expected: INVALID_ARGUMENT from buf.validate string length constraint
test_04_createtrip_oversized_title.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: title: value length must be at most 512 characters

test_05_invalid_status_transition.description: Set trip to COMPLETED then try to set back to PLANNING
test_05_invalid_status_transition.actual: failed_precondition: invalid trip status transition: completed -> planning
test_05_invalid_status_transition.notes: State machine is enforced. PLANNING->COMPLETED is allowed, COMPLETED->PLANNING is rejected with FAILED_PRECONDITION. This is intentional behavior.

test_06_sendmessage_empty_content.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: content: value length must be at least 1 characters
test_06_sendmessage_empty_content.notes: buf.validate constraint prevents empty messages from reaching AI.

test_07_sendmessage_oversized_content.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: content: value length must be at most 10000 characters
test_07_sendmessage_oversized_content.notes: buf.validate max_len constraint on message content working.

test_08_deletebooking_nonexistent.notes: Idempotent delete behavior. No error, no 500. Both NOT_FOUND and silent success are acceptable per the persona spec.

test_09_ingestbooking_empty_rawtext.actual: invalid_argument: validation error: raw_text: value length must be at least 1 characters
test_09_ingestbooking_empty_rawtext.notes: buf.validate constraint prevents empty booking text from reaching AI parser.

test_10_listtrips_response_format.description: ListTrips returns proper array response (not an error for collections)
test_10_listtrips_response_format.actual: 200 OK with trips array and pagination object
test_10_listtrips_response_format.notes: API correctly returns array of trips with pagination metadata. Does not return NOT_FOUND for collections.
